strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Polyglot builder with full-stack delivery and open-source platform founding experience
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP tooling, and agentic developer workflows
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth — no published AI products, research, or ML platform leadership
Career titled at Senior/Staff IC level; no evidence of Principal/Director-level scope or strategic advisory
No advanced degree in AI and no record of advising strategic customers or partners on cloud/AI adoption

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Director-level IC influence and external thought leadership

response.justification: The candidate brings broad, hands-on engineering experience across many domains and recent contact with AI-agent tooling, which aligns with the builder/code/design fluency the role values. However, the role is a Director-level IC focused on AI strategy and recognized AI expertise, and the resume shows neither sustained AI/ML product leadership nor the strategic advisory and external influence profile expected at the Principal level.
